message:
✨ New version 3.6

• The three dots (⋮) now actually FILTER: when you turn on an option, the SKUs that don't match disappear and you only see what you want.
• New options: Show put away (separate from receiving) and Hide OTHERS.
• With Show all on, choosing receiving or put away splits the screen by person: Wilson — Receiving with everything he did, then Wilson — Put away, and so on for each name.
• Stability and live sync improvements.

Download and install now?
